questions.question: Pradhan Mantri National Apprenticeship Mela is an initiative of which Union Ministry?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

answer.label: A
answer.text: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

questions.explanation: Pradhan Mantri National Apprenticeship Mela is an initiative of Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship. Pradhan Mantri National Apprenticeship Mela will take place on 12 December 2022 in 197 locations throughout 25 states and Union Territories. It is a part of the Skill India Mission, to increase the number of job opportunities for young people in India.

questions.question: Which is the first state to launch its dedicated climate change mission?
questions.explanation: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister M K Stalin launched the Tamil Nadu Climate Change Mission to protect the natural resources in the state as well as to restore them. The State’s Climate Action Plan will be implemented by the Tamil Nadu Green Climate Company (TNGCC). Tamil Nadu has decided to stop any additions to its existing coal power capacity as the mission sought to generate half of electricity through renewable sources by 2030.

questions.question: Which city is set to host the India International Science Festival (IISF)-2022?
questions.explanation: Union Minister of State Science & Technology Dr Jitendra Singh said that India International Science Festival (IISF)-2022 will be held in Bhopal in January 2023 . It is one of the major events to be held after India took over G-20 Presidency. IISF is the initiative of the Ministry of Science & Technology and Ministry of Earth Science in association with Vijnana Bharati science movement.

questions.question: Which countries announced ‘Just Transition Initiative’ to tackle plastic pollution in an inclusive manner?
questions.explanation: South Africa and Kenya have recently announced the Just Transition Initiative to tackle plastic pollution in an inclusive manner. The Just Transition initiative was launched in the aftermath of negotiations on Intergovernmental Negotiating Committee (INC) to phase out plastic held in Uruguay. The initiative aims to create decent work opportunities for waste-pickers and other workers in the plastic value chain.

questions.question: Which state/UT has proposed to launch a unique alpha-numeric identification number for all families?
questions.explanation: Jammu & Kashmir Lieutenant-Governor Manoj Sinha said the administration will launch an eight-digit unique alpha-numeric identification number for families in the Union Territory. The Unique Family ID aims for speedy and transparent implementation of social security schemes. The JK Family ID will also be used to determine eligibility of beneficiaries of various social welfare schemes.

questions.question: Which institution launched the ‘International Climate Club’?
questions.explanation: The Group of Seven economies have created an open, international climate club for countries to cooperate in the fight against global warming, German Chancellor Olaf Scholz, who holds the presidency of the G-7 until the end of the year, announced the decision. Germany will pass the Presidency to Japan. The club will work to help accelerate the industrial transition to cleaner forms of energy and to further develop emission-reduction measures

questions.question: Which state recently passed a bill to remove Governor as Chancellor of state’s universities?
questions.explanation: Kerala Assembly recently passed a Bill to remove the Governor as the ex-officio Chancellor of 14 universities in the state. The CPI(M) government introduced the University Laws (Amendments) Bill in the Assembly after repeated issues with Governor Arif Mohammed Khan on administration and appointments at these universities. The Bill will now be sent for the governor’s consent before it becomes a law.

questions.question: Which institution launched ‘NPS Prosperity Planner’ to calculate retirement Income?
questions.explanation: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) launched the ‘NPS Prosperity Planner’ to calculate retirement Income. It is a personalized calculator for subscribers to calculate their retirement Income (Annuity) as per the annuity options based on their existing contribution under NPS. The new calculator will allow subscribers to plan for adequacy retirement income and it has been made available by the Central Recordkeeping Agency.

questions.question: Which two teams are playing the final match of the FIFA Football World Cup 2022?
questions.explanation: Argentina defeated Croatia 3-0 in the semi-final match and stormed into FIFA World Cup final. This is their 6th World Cup final. France ended Morocco’s dream run in Qatar and entered the summit clash with Lionel Messi’s Argentina.

questions.question: Which Indian initiative has been recognised by the Conference of Parties (COP15) to the Convention on Biodiversity (CBD)?
questions.explanation: The Namami Gange initiative was recognised during the 15th Conference of Parties (COP15) to the Convention on Biodiversity (CBD) in Montreal, Canada on World Restoration Day. Namami Gange initiative to rejuvenate river Ganga was recognised as one of the top 10 World Restoration Flagships aimed at reviving the natural world. The initiatives were selected under the United Nations Decade on Ecosystem Restoration.
